info.description: Unified Postman collection for Widia Kencana API endpoints.
info.name: Widia Kencana - All

exec: pm.test("Login response has access token", function () {

request.description: Login with email and password. On success, returns auth.access_token and sets refresh_token HttpOnly cookie.

exec: pm.test("Refresh response has access token", function () {

request.description: Uses refresh_token from HttpOnly cookie to issue a new access token and rotate refresh token.
Invalidate the current device refresh session in Redis and clear its cookie. Other devices remain signed in.
Invalidate every refresh session owned by the authenticated user and clear the current device cookie. Existing access tokens remain valid until they expire.

response.name: Logout All Devices - Success

request.description: Get user profile from access token claims.
Read active paper/media options for document setup.
Read active element palette options. Without code, response is lightweight. With code=all, response includes each element properties and property options.

query.description: Optional. Use all to include every element with properties and options, or use a specific code such as grid.

request.description: Read active reusable property definitions.
Read active selectable options for document properties.
Read active mapping between selected element and editable properties. Optional element_code filter returns only properties for one element and includes property options.

query.description: Optional. Exact element code filter, for example grid, text, image, table.

request.description: List documents. Optional filters: name uses case-insensitive LIKE, token uses exact UUID match.

query.description: Optional. Case-insensitive LIKE filter for document name.

request.description: Replace last path segment with document token. Use with_layer=true to include layer tree with element properties and options.

query.description: Optional. Set true to include document layer tree grouped by header, body, and footer.

response.name: Get Document Detail - Success

request.description: Create a document template. position is assigned by backend default and is not required on create. document_type options: quotation, purchase-order, invoice, service-report, custom. If document_type is empty, backend defaults it to custom. status options: draft, active, inactive, archived, deleted. settings is a flexible JSON object for document-level configuration.

response.name: Create Document - Success

request.description: Replace last path segment with document token. document_type options: quotation, purchase-order, invoice, service-report, custom. If document_type is empty, backend defaults it to custom. status options: draft, active, inactive, archived, deleted. settings is a flexible JSON object for document-level configuration.
Soft delete document by setting status to deleted.

Create a document layer. V1 supported elements: grid, text, image, watermark, table, divider, spacer. Use document/parent/element tokens, not numeric IDs. parent_token is empty for root layer. Replace element_token with token from GET /api/document-master/elements?code=all in your database.

response.body:
{
  "status": "ok",
  "message": "Document layer created successfully",
  "data": {
    "layer": {
      "token": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000601",
      "document_token": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000501",
      "parent_token": "",
      "element": {
        "token": "55bc433b-c5b4-41e6-be8b-d964d343bc42",
        "code": "grid",
        "name": "Grid",
        "renderer_type": "html",
        "renderer_tag": "div",
        "content_type": "none",
        "is_container": true,
        "status": "active",
        "properties": []
      },
      "region": "body",
      "name": "Two Column Grid",
      "content": {},
      "properties": {
        "display": "grid",
        "grid-template-columns": "[50,50]",
        "padding": "16",
        "justify-items": "stretch",
        "align-items": "stretch",
        "margin": "0"
      },
      "position": 1,
      "status": "active",
      "created_at": "2026-07-13T10:00:00Z",
      "updated_at": "2026-07-13T10:00:00Z"
    }
  }
}
response.name: Create Grid Layer - Success

request.description: Update document layer by layer token. Request body uses the same shape as create.
Sort sibling layers inside the same document, parent, and region group.

Delete one or more document layers. For single delete, call DELETE /api/document-layer-delete/:token without body. For bulk delete, call DELETE /api/document-layer-delete with document_token and tokens body. Child layers are hard-deleted by database cascade.
Replace last path segment with project id.
Replace last path segment with project id.
Soft delete project by setting status to deleted.
Upsert purchase order items by quotation id and optionally upload one asset. Send item fields with indexed multipart keys such as items[0].name, items[0].qty, items[0].unit, and items[0].price.

response.name: Upsert Purchase Order - Success With Asset
Upsert Purchase Order - Clear All Items

request.description: Both query params are optional. Status is matched per token from colon-delimited values like new:po:sr.

query.description: Optional. Filter by status step token inside quotations.status, for example new, po, or sr.
Optional. Case-insensitive partial match against project.
